timer_record(3) Library Functions Manual timer_record(3)

NAME

timer_record - Individual timer record for a named timing operation.

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/util/time.h>

Data Fields


char * name
Timer name (heap-allocated, unique key). uint64_t start_ticks
Start time in sokol ticks. UT_hash_handle hh
uthash handle (makes this hashable by name)

Detailed Description

Individual timer record for a named timing operation.

Definition at line 248 of file time.h.

Field Documentation

uthash handle (makes this hashable by name)
